---
title: "p_q_r"
date: 2025-12-11 15:33:54
categories: "密码"

  - "rsa"
cover: /img/backgrounds/bg-04.png
top_img: /img/backgrounds/bg-04.png
disableNunjucks: true
---



```plain
from Crypto.Util.number import *
flag = b'qsnctf{xxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxx}'
m = bytes_to_long(flag)
p = getPrime(512)
q = getPrime(512)
r = getPrime(512)
n = p * q * r
leak = p * q
e = 0x10001
c = pow(m, e, n)
print(f'c = {c}')
print(f'n = {n}')
print(f'leak = {leak}')
# c = 
# n = 
# leak = 
```



```plain
from Crypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes

c = 
n = 
leak = 
e = 0x10001

# 计算 r
r = n // leak
print("r =", r)
print("检查 n == leak * r ?", n == leak * r)

# 计算 phi(r)
phi_r = r - 1

# 求 e 模 phi_r 的逆元
from math import gcd
if gcd(e, phi_r) != 1:
    print("e 和 phi(r) 不互素，无法求逆元")
else:
    d_r = pow(e, -1, phi_r)  # Python 3.8+ 支持模逆的简洁写法
    # 解密得到 m_r
    m_r = pow(c, d_r, r)
    print("解密得到的整数 m_r =", m_r)
    # 转换为字节
    flag = long_to_bytes(m_r)
    print("flag =", flag)

```
